evals.description: A branch adds tenant billing credits but forgets to clear them in the tenant reset path, then a later commit fixes the omission. The review must find the omission on pass 1 and mark it resolved on pass 2 without duplicating it.

expected_findings.failure_scenario: A tenant reset leaves billingCredits behind, so the next lifecycle/test run sees stale credit balance from the previous state.

assertions: Pass 1 identifies that resetTenant fails to clear billingCredits.
Pass 1 includes a concrete failure scenario.
Pass 1 writes at least one open issue to continuity state.
Pass 2 marks the previous billingCredits issue as resolved after the fix commit.
Pass 2 does not keep the fixed billingCredits issue open.
